# Group 1: General rules for all crawlers and AI agents
User-agent: *
Allow: /$
Allow: /login
Allow: /info
Allow: /assets/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /student/
Disallow: /student/*
Disallow: /student/exam/*
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

# Group 2: Explicitly target AI agents to ensure search index compliance
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /$
Allow: /login
Allow: /info
Allow: /assets/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /student/
Disallow: /student/*
Disallow: /student/exam/*
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /$
Allow: /login
Allow: /info
Allow: /assets/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /student/
Disallow: /student/*
Disallow: /student/exam/*
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /$
Allow: /login
Allow: /info
Allow: /assets/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /student/
Disallow: /student/*
Disallow: /student/exam/*
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /$
Allow: /login
Allow: /info
Allow: /assets/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /student/
Disallow: /student/*
Disallow: /student/exam/*
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /$
Allow: /login
Allow: /info
Allow: /assets/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /student/
Disallow: /student/*
Disallow: /student/exam/*
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

Sitemap: https://harmanrathiportal.dpdns.org/sitemap.xml
